scripts.test: pnpm --filter caseiq-api test && pnpm --filter caseiq-web test && pnpm run test:python
scripts.test:integration: pnpm --filter caseiq-api exec vitest run src/consent.integration.test.ts src/app.integration.test.ts
scripts.test:system: pnpm --filter caseiq-api exec vitest run src/plaintiff-consent-flow.system.test.ts
